overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a player wading through a shallow forest river during a rainy overcast afternoon. The cinematic game engine renders dense deciduous forests, rocky riverbeds, and atmospheric mist as the character explores the natural wilderness.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow forest river with visible rocky bed

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow river water, navigating between rocks while surrounded by dense forest on both banks

entered.detail: shallow flowing water covering the rocky riverbed with visible ripples from rain
dense deciduous trees forming a dark green wall along the left bank
tall trees with thick canopy lining the right side of the river
dark wet boulders protruding from the water surface
misty tree line visible through the hazy rain in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view wading through a shallow forest river. Rain falls steadily on the water surface as the camera moves forward between scattered rocks. Dense deciduous forests line both banks under an overcast gray-purple sky, creating a cool, atmospheric wilderness setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: mid-river section with large boulder formations

events.description: slight turn to the right to navigate around a large rock formation in the water

agents.ego_description: continuing through the river while maneuvering around larger rock obstacles and observing the grassy banks

entered.detail: prominent moss-covered rock formation rising from the river on the left side
green grass and vegetation growing along the water's edge on the right bank

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the river section, the camera passes a large moss-covered boulder on the left while grassy banks become visible on the right. The forest walls on both sides draw closer, transitioning from distant backdrops to mid-ground elements as the wading continues through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: river bend with grassy banks and twisted ancient trees

events.description: river curves to the right revealing denser vegetation and a prominent twisted tree on the right bank

agents.ego_description: approaching the grassy riverbank while navigating the river's curve, moving toward denser forest vegetation

entered.detail: large gnarled tree with twisted branches extending over the water from the right bank
thick grass and bushes growing along the river's edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the river's curve toward the right bank, where an ancient twisted tree with gnarled branches dominates the foreground. The water shifts to the left side of the frame as the camera approaches the grassy shore, with dense undergrowth and thick forest canopy filling the view ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a rainy forest river that gradually narrows as it curves toward a dense, wooded shoreline. It begins by wading through shallow water and scattered rocks under an overcast gray-purple sky, with dense deciduous forests lining the distant banks. As the camera moves deeper into the river, it passes a large moss-covered boulder while the surrounding forest walls draw closer, shifting from distant backdrops to immediate mid-ground elements. The scene then follows the river's curve toward the right, where the water shifts to the left of the frame to make room for an ancient twisted tree with gnarled branches. Finally, the camera approaches the grassy shore, with thick undergrowth and a heavy forest canopy filling the view ahead.
